results.yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: policy
spec:
  platform: windows
  name: 'STIG - Ensure ''No Lock Screen Toast Notification'' is set to ''Enabled'''
  query: SELECT 1 FROM mdm_bridge WHERE mdm_command_input = '<SyncBody><Get><CmdID>1</CmdID><Item><Target><LocURI>./User/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Result/ADMX_WPN/NoLockScreenToastNotification</LocURI></Target></Item></Get></SyncBody>' AND mdm_command_output LIKE '%<Enabled/>%';
  purpose: Informational
  tags: framework:DISA-STIG, benchmark:DISA-STIG, platform:windows, control:win11-stig-v2r4:wpn-nolockscreentoastnotification
  description: 'STIG setting: ./User/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Config/ADMX_WPN/NoLockScreenToastNotification'
  resolution: 'To establish the recommended configuration via configuration profiles, set the following Settings Catalog path. Policy\Config\ADMX_WPN\NoLockScreenToastNotification'

apiVersion: v1
kind: policy
spec:
  platform: windows
  name: 'STIG - Ensure ''Do Not Preserve Zone Information'' is set to ''Disabled'''
  query: SELECT 1 FROM mdm_bridge WHERE mdm_command_input = '<SyncBody><Get><CmdID>1</CmdID><Item><Target><LocURI>./User/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Result/AttachmentManager/DoNotPreserveZoneInformation</LocURI></Target></Item></Get></SyncBody>' AND mdm_command_output LIKE '%<Disabled/>%';
  purpose: Informational
  tags: framework:DISA-STIG, benchmark:DISA-STIG, platform:windows, control:win11-stig-v2r4:attachmentmanager-donotpreservezoneinformation
  description: 'STIG setting: ./User/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Config/AttachmentManager/DoNotPreserveZoneInformation'
  resolution: 'To establish the recommended configuration via configuration profiles, set the following Settings Catalog path. Policy\Config\AttachmentManager\DoNotPreserveZoneInformation'

apiVersion: v1
kind: policy
spec:
  platform: windows
  name: 'STIG - Ensure ''Allow Windows Spotlight'' is set to ''Enabled'''
  query: SELECT 1 FROM mdm_bridge WHERE mdm_command_input = '<SyncBody><Get><CmdID>1</CmdID><Item><Target><LocURI>./User/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Result/Experience/AllowWindowsSpotlight</LocURI></Target></Item></Get></SyncBody>' AND mdm_command_output = '1';
  purpose: Informational
  tags: framework:DISA-STIG, benchmark:DISA-STIG, platform:windows, control:win11-stig-v2r4:experience-allowwindowsspotlight
  description: 'Specifies whether to turn off all Windows spotlight features at once. If you enable this policy setting, Windows spotlight on lock screen, Windows Tips, Microsoft consumer features and other related features will be turned off. You should enable this policy setting if your goal is to minimize network traffic from target devices. If you disable or do not configure this policy setting, Windows spotlight features are allowed and may be controlled individually using their corresponding policy settings. Most restricted value is 0.'
  resolution: 'To establish the recommended configuration via configuration profiles, set the following Settings Catalog path. Policy\Config\Experience\AllowWindowsSpotlight'

apiVersion: v1
kind: policy
spec:
  platform: windows
  name: 'STIG - Ensure ''Allow Third Party Suggestions In Windows Spotlight'' is set to ''Disabled'''
  query: SELECT 1 FROM mdm_bridge WHERE mdm_command_input = '<SyncBody><Get><CmdID>1</CmdID><Item><Target><LocURI>./User/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Result/Experience/AllowThirdPartySuggestionsInWindowsSpotlight</LocURI></Target></Item></Get></SyncBody>' AND mdm_command_output = '0';
  purpose: Informational
  tags: framework:DISA-STIG, benchmark:DISA-STIG, platform:windows, control:win11-stig-v2r4:allowthirdpartysuggestionsinwindowsspotlight-0
  description: 'Specifies whether to allow app and content suggestions from third-party software publishers in Windows spotlight features like lock screen spotlight, suggested apps in the Start menu, and Windows tips. Users may still see suggestions for Microsoft features, apps, and services.'
  resolution: 'To establish the recommended configuration via configuration profiles, set the following Settings Catalog path. Policy\Config\Experience\AllowThirdPartySuggestionsInWindowsSpotlight'

apiVersion: v1
kind: policy
spec:
  platform: windows
  name: 'STIG - Ensure ''Turn Off Windows Copilot'' is set to ''Enabled'''
  query: SELECT 1 FROM mdm_bridge WHERE mdm_command_input = '<SyncBody><Get><CmdID>1</CmdID><Item><Target><LocURI>./User/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Result/WindowsAI/TurnOffWindowsCopilot</LocURI></Target></Item></Get></SyncBody>' AND mdm_command_output = '1';
  purpose: Informational
  tags: framework:DISA-STIG, benchmark:DISA-STIG, platform:windows, control:win11-stig-v2r4:windowsai-turnoffwindowscopilot
  description: 'This policy setting allows you to turn off Windows Copilot. If you enable this policy setting, users will not be able to use Copilot. The Copilot icon will not appear on the taskbar either. If you disable or do not configure this policy setting, users will be able to use Copilot when it''s available to them.'
  resolution: 'To establish the recommended configuration via configuration profiles, set the following Settings Catalog path. Policy\Config\WindowsAI\TurnOffWindowsCopilot'
